name: frPDU
title: frPDU
syntax: frPDU MsgChannel<num>.< FIBEX PDU name> <PDU var>; // form 2
description: This can be used to create a FlexRay PDU object. The object data can be manipulated via the object's selectors. Additional object properties can be read from the selectors.
The object is then registered using the frSetSendPDU and transmitted using the frUpdatePDU functions.

parameters.name: <FIBEX PDU name>
parameters.description: String that corresponds to a PDU name in the database. The parameters needed to uniquely identify the PDU are taken from the corresponding PDU definition in the database.

parameters.name: <PDU var>
parameters.description: String that specifies the variable name of the object.

parameters.name: MsgChannel<num>
parameters.description: Specifies the transmission channel/cluster <num> must be a whole number (e.g. 1, 2, 3, ...) that specifies the channel number of the corresponding FlexRay interface.

description: For an example see function frUpdatePDU.
This is an example for forwarding the payload to other functions.
This is an example for using the PDU object as a function parameter.
This is an example for using the PDU object in arrays.
All objects of an array must be initialized with an appropriate PDU definition!

availability: 6.0: form 1 7.5: enhanced for usage in arrays and as function parameter: form 1
6.1: form 1 7.5: enhanced for usage in arrays and as function parameter: form 1
